title: ZXSpace

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZX Snake, ZX Brick and ZX Space

description: ZXSpace is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a retro-inspired arcade space shooter featuring fast paced gameplay, enemy waves, unlockable upgrades, achievements, and classic 1980s inspired visuals.
features: Defend Earth from invading alien forces
BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic unlocks

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic items across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned through gameplay only.
